# Delta V

> Swiss-based studio delivering tech foundations, strategic growth, cybersecurity, and research services for decentralized technologies.

Delta V is a Swiss studio that helps organisations adopt decentralized technologies. We build and operate web and Web3 systems, run cybersecurity and privacy audits, deliver on-chain / OSINT research, and support strategic growth in EU and Swiss markets. Engagements run as paid scope -> fixed-fee pilot -> optional operate retainer.

Contact: contact@deltav.cc - Signal: @DeltaV.01 - Site: https://deltav.cc

## Services

- Tech Foundations: web and mobile apps, IT infrastructure, scalable Web3 integration, Web3 apps.
- Growth Boost: strategic expansion (EU / Swiss), public good advocacy and fundraising.
- Cybersecurity: privacy audits, GenAI and agent development, CryptoSec, threat monitoring.
- Research Services: market research reports, on-chain / OSINT analysis, training.

## Selected Work

- Hardened a Swiss DAO treasury through multi-sig review, smart-contract diff against upstream, and an incident-response runbook delivered in 14 days. Outcome: 0 critical findings post-remediation.
- Shipped a cross-border on-ramp: compliant fiat-to-stablecoin flows for a Lemanic fintech across EU and Swiss markets. Outcome: 6-week design-to-production.
- Mapped an on-chain attribution case: cluster analysis and OSINT enrichment recovered evidentiary clarity for civil-recovery counsel. Outcome: USD 2.4M assets traced.

## How we engage

1. Scope - paid discovery call producing a written brief (outcomes, constraints, risks).
2. Pilot - fixed-fee engagement that proves the approach end-to-end with real artifacts.
3. Operate - hand over a system the client owns; optional retainer for monitoring or continued engineering.

## Principles

- Tech natives: passionate professionals at the forefront of decentralization and digital upskilling - we build, operate, and live the stack.
- Self-ownership focused: every solution prioritizes user control over data, keys, and decisions.
